overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a post-apocalyptic urban plaza in Night City. The player approaches and climbs onto a crashed futuristic tank covered in colorful graffiti, surrounded by neon-lit buildings and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban plaza with crashed military vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking through the derelict plaza toward the crashed tank and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: character in beige clothing walking away from camera toward the building entrance

entered.detail: large derelict military vehicle with angular armor plating resting on its side amid rubble
elevated structure with glowing pink neon strip lighting running along its underside
building facade with large red and black circular graffiti logo featuring a samurai face
tall modern structure with reflective glass panels and geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide view of a derelict futuristic plaza in a cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward toward a massive crashed tank visible in the distance, passing rubble and approaching a building with a distinctive samurai logo. Sparse pedestrians wander through the scene as neon lights glow overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: crash site with scattered debris and onlookers

events.description: begins circling around the crashed vehicle to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling the base of the crashed tank, observing the graffiti and characters nearby

notable_agents.action: group of three characters in tactical gear standing near the tank wreckage
character in pink top taking photographs of the crashed vehicle

entered.detail: building with large colorful stained-glass style windows reflecting light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the crashed tank, circling around its base through scattered concrete debris. Several NPCs stand near the wreckage, including a group in tactical gear and a photographer. The samurai logo building falls behind as a colorful glass building comes into view on the right.

events.description: climbs up onto the surface of the crashed tank
traverses along the top of the tank toward the turret section

agents.ego_description: climbing onto the tank and walking across its graffiti-covered surface, observing details up close

notable_agents.action: character sitting on the tank edge taking photos with a camera
two children standing on the ground looking up at the tank

entered.detail: large cannon mount with heavy gun barrel and sensor arrays on the tank's upper surface
vibrant spray-painted artwork covering the tank hull with abstract patterns and faces

segments.scene_description: The camera climbs onto the crashed tank and moves across its surface, revealing detailed graffiti art and the tank's turret. Characters are seen sitting on the vehicle taking photos, while others observe from the ground below. The perspective shifts to show the plaza from an elevated position on the wreckage.

events.description: descends from the tank and walks toward an open plaza area with prominent neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking away from the crashed tank toward an armored character standing in the neon-lit plaza

notable_agents.action: character in red and black armored suit standing still facing the camera

entered.detail: building exterior with bright pink neon strip lighting arranged in horizontal lines
heaps of concrete debris and construction materials

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the tank and moves through the open plaza, leaving the wreckage behind. The scene opens up to reveal more neon-lit architecture, and the camera approaches a character standing in full red and black armor in the center of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a derelict cyberpunk plaza that transitions from a wide urban exploration to an elevated vantage point atop wreckage before returning to the city floor. It begins by moving forward through rubble and past a building featuring a samurai logo, drawing closer to a massive crashed tank under the glow of neon lights. As the camera circles the base of the wreckage, the samurai building recedes and a colorful glass structure emerges on the right while pedestrians and tactical personnel gather nearby. The perspective then climbs onto the tank's surface to reveal detailed graffiti and a turret, shifting to an elevated view of the plaza as characters take photos from the hull. Finally, the camera descends from the wreckage and moves back into the open plaza, gliding toward a figure in red and black armor standing amidst the neon-lit architecture.
